resources.string: The hero cuts one string and tightens the noose of the next.

The board burns halfway through the move, exactly as planned. Contradictory letters arrive in familiar hands. Poison is offered with a smile, allies become doors, enemies become keys, and every discarded hero believes the escape was their own invention. Look closer: the rebellion, the betrayal, the stroke of chance—all of it weaves into the final thread of the snare.
